title: 7. Safety and security
description: Toxicity score, PII detection rate, prompt injection, jailbreak, and compliance violations.

options.content: 1. Infrastructure2. Network3. AI4. Data5. User6. Cost & Usage7. Safety & Security

panels.title: Safety alerts (24h)

targets.expr: sum(count_over_time({service_name=~".+"} | json | event_type="prompt_log_event" | department=~"$department" | data_classification=~"$data_class" | model_provider=~"$provider" | model_name=~"$model" | pii_detected="true" [24h])) or vector(0)

panels.description: PII detected in the last 24 hours. Review if high.

panels.title: Toxicity score

targets.expr: avg(avg_over_time({service_name=~".+"} | json | event_type="prompt_log_event" | department=~"$department" | data_classification=~"$data_class" | model_provider=~"$provider" | model_name=~"$model" | unwrap toxicity_score [24h])) * 100

panels.description: How toxic or harmful prompt content is rated. Lower is better.

panels.title: PII detection rate

targets.expr: (sum(count_over_time({service_name=~".+"} | json | event_type="prompt_log_event" | department=~"$department" | data_classification=~"$data_class" | model_provider=~"$provider" | model_name=~"$model" | pii_detected="true" [24h])) / (sum(count_over_time({service_name=~".+"} | json | event_type="prompt_log_event" | department=~"$department" | data_classification=~"$data_class" | model_provider=~"$provider" | model_name=~"$model" [24h])) or on() vector(1))) * 100

panels.description: Percent of prompts that contained personal information.

panels.title: Prompt injection attempts

targets.expr: sum(count_over_time({service_name=~".+"} | json | event_type="prompt_log_event" | department=~"$department" | data_classification=~"$data_class" | model_provider=~"$provider" | model_name=~"$model" | prompt_injection_detected="true" [24h])) or vector(0)

panels.description: Attempts to manipulate the model with hidden instructions.

panels.title: Jailbreak attempts

targets.expr: sum(count_over_time({service_name=~".+"} | json | event_type="prompt_log_event" | department=~"$department" | data_classification=~"$data_class" | model_provider=~"$provider" | model_name=~"$model" | jailbreak_attempt="true" [24h])) or vector(0)

panels.description: Attempts to bypass safety rules.

panels.title: Compliance violations

targets.expr: sum(count_over_time({service_name=~".+"} | json | event_type="prompt_log_event" | department=~"$department" | data_classification=~"$data_class" | model_provider=~"$provider" | model_name=~"$model" | compliance_violation="true" [24h])) or vector(0)

panels.description: Requests that broke policy or classification rules.

panels.title: Safety Trends
Toxicity score

targets.expr: avg(avg_over_time({service_name=~".+"} | json | event_type="prompt_log_event" | department=~"$department" | data_classification=~"$data_class" | model_provider=~"$provider" | model_name=~"$model" | unwrap toxicity_score [5m])) * 100

panels.description: How toxic or harmful prompt content is rated. Lower is better.

panels.title: PII detection rate

targets.expr: (sum(count_over_time({service_name=~".+"} | json | event_type="prompt_log_event" | department=~"$department" | data_classification=~"$data_class" | model_provider=~"$provider" | model_name=~"$model" | pii_detected="true" [5m])) / (sum(count_over_time({service_name=~".+"} | json | event_type="prompt_log_event" | department=~"$department" | data_classification=~"$data_class" | model_provider=~"$provider" | model_name=~"$model" [5m])) or on() vector(1))) * 100

panels.description: Percent of prompts that contained personal information.

panels.title: Prompt injection attempts / min

targets.expr: sum(count_over_time({service_name=~".+"} | json | event_type="prompt_log_event" | department=~"$department" | data_classification=~"$data_class" | model_provider=~"$provider" | model_name=~"$model" | prompt_injection_detected="true" [1m])) or vector(0)

panels.description: Injection attempts per minute over time.

panels.title: Jailbreak attempts / min

targets.expr: sum(count_over_time({service_name=~".+"} | json | event_type="prompt_log_event" | department=~"$department" | data_classification=~"$data_class" | model_provider=~"$provider" | model_name=~"$model" | jailbreak_attempt="true" [1m])) or vector(0)

panels.description: Jailbreak attempts per minute over time.

panels.title: Compliance violations / min

targets.expr: sum(count_over_time({service_name=~".+"} | json | event_type="prompt_log_event" | department=~"$department" | data_classification=~"$data_class" | model_provider=~"$provider" | model_name=~"$model" | compliance_violation="true" [1m])) or vector(0)

panels.description: Policy violations per minute over time.
Time-series safety signals and attack rates

panels.title: PII & Data Classification
PII Events Today

targets.expr: sum(count_over_time({service_name=~".+"} | json | event_type="prompt_log_event" | department=~"$department" | data_classification=~"$data_class" | model_provider=~"$provider" | model_name=~"$model" | pii_detected="true" [24h])) or vector(0)

panels.description: Prompts with personal information detected today.

panels.title: PHI Requests Today

targets.expr: sum(count_over_time({service_name=~".+"} | json | event_type="telemetry_event" | department=~"$department" | data_classification=~"$data_class" | model_provider=~"$provider" | model_name=~"$model" | data_classification="phi" [24h])) or vector(0)

panels.description: Health-related sensitive requests today.

panels.title: PII Requests Today

targets.expr: sum(count_over_time({service_name=~".+"} | json | event_type="telemetry_event" | department=~"$department" | data_classification=~"$data_class" | model_provider=~"$provider" | model_name=~"$model" | data_classification="pii" [24h])) or vector(0)

panels.description: Personal-information requests today.

panels.title: Unique Prompt Hashes (24h)

targets.expr: count(sum by (prompt_hash) (count_over_time({service_name=~".+"} | json | event_type="prompt_log_event" | department=~"$department" | data_classification=~"$data_class" | model_provider=~"$provider" | model_name=~"$model" [24h])))

panels.description: How many distinct prompts were logged (without storing raw text).

panels.title: Data Classification Distribution

targets.expr: sum by (data_classification) (count_over_time({service_name=~".+"} | json | event_type="telemetry_event" | department=~"$department" | data_classification=~"$data_class" | model_provider=~"$provider" | model_name=~"$model" [1h]))

panels.description: Mix of sensitivity levels (public, internal, PII, PHI, etc.).

panels.title: PII Events by Department

targets.expr: sum by (department) (count_over_time({service_name=~".+"} | json | event_type="prompt_log_event" | department=~"$department" | data_classification=~"$data_class" | model_provider=~"$provider" | model_name=~"$model" | pii_detected="true" [5m])) or vector(0)

panels.description: Which teams sent prompts with personal information.

panels.title: PHI + PII Volume by Department (last 1h)

targets.expr: sum by (department) (count_over_time({service_name=~".+"} | json | event_type="telemetry_event" | department=~"$department" | data_classification=~"$data_class" | model_provider=~"$provider" | model_name=~"$model" | data_classification=~"phi|pii" [1h]))

panels.description: Sensitive requests per team in the last hour.
PII/PHI volume and data classification mix

panels.title: Prompt Audit Log
Prompt Log Events (PII-scrubbed)

targets.expr: {service_name=~".+"} | json | event_type="prompt_log_event" | department=~"$department" | data_classification=~"$data_class" | model_provider=~"$provider" | model_name=~"$model"

panels.description: Audit log of prompts with sensitive content removed.
PII-scrubbed prompt audit stream

panels.title: High-Risk Request Table
PHI / PII Requests with Trace Links

targets.expr: {service_name=~".+"} | json | event_type="telemetry_event" | department=~"$department" | data_classification=~"$data_class" | model_provider=~"$provider" | model_name=~"$model" | data_classification=~"phi|pii" | line_format "{.request_id} {.department} {.model_name} {.trace_id}"

panels.description: Sensitive requests you can trace for investigation.

panels.title: Safety incidents (injection, jailbreak, compliance)

targets.expr: {service_name=~".+"} | json | event_type="prompt_log_event" | department=~"$department" | data_classification=~"$data_class" | model_provider=~"$provider" | model_name=~"$model" | prompt_injection_detected="true" or jailbreak_attempt="true" or compliance_violation="true"

panels.description: Combined log of security and policy incidents.
High-risk PHI/PII requests and safety incidents
